subcodes.title: Words spoken at House of the Master in Haifa, 1919-08-08
subcodes.first_line: Among all the worldly bounties none is more wonderful than the dream.  In this state the human spirit
subcodes.first_line_orig: میانه جمیع این نعمای جسمانی از همه لذیزتر خواب است روح انسانی یکقدری آزاد میشود
subcodes.subjects: @meaning; importance of dreams and visions, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @Judaism; the Torah; the Jewish people
